title: FuninCrea Dream Catcher, Half Circle Moon Dream Catchers with Feathers Handmade Fairy Dreamcatcher Indian Style Hanging Wall Decor for Living Room, Bedroom, Dormitory (Colorful)
features: 【Featured Feather Pendant】:Our dream catcher kit is a feather pendant on the wall. The feathers are fumigated and processed through a number of special processes, and they are soft and rich in appearance.
✨【Purely Hand-woven Moon Net】:The moon net is hand-woven by experienced masters, and the grid is uniform and regular. In the legend, dream catchers can seal nightmares and leave beautiful dreams.

✨【A Beautiful Gift Blessing】:Dream catcher hoops as a gift to different people represents different blessings. Give it to family members to represent health and safety, and everything goes well. Giving it to a friend represents a long-lasting friendship. Give it to your lover to express your love.
✨【Indian Style Decor】:The moon decor is a mascot from the Indians. It is a primitive decorative pendant that can get rid of nightmares and bring good dreams to a peaceful night.
✨【The Perfect Decorations for Space】: Dream catchers are suitable for decorating your living room, bedroom, dormitory, cozy cafe and studio, wedding party and various parties, etc.

The Origin of Dream Catcher The Dream Catcher originated in the 18th century, when Native Americans used it to capture beautiful dreams and let nightmares disappear with the morning sunlight. They believed that the night air was filled with various dreams, and only the Dream Catcher could filter them and lead them into beautiful dreamlands. The Legend of Dream Catcher The traditional dream net is made of twigs woven into a circle, wrapped in leather around the circle, and then wrapped with cow tendons to create a net within the circle. Colorful beads will be worn on the beef tendon line, and some feathers will hang on one end of the circle. Legend has it that only good dreams can pass through that hole and flow down the feathers, while nightmares will be trapped in the net and disappear without a trace with the next day's sunlight. The Meaning of Dream Catcher Capture beautiful dreams. Drive out nightmares. Pray for peace and good luck. Dream catchers symbolize the retention of good dreams and blessings, and are believed to drive away nightmares, bringing peace and good luck. Decorations. Dream catchers also have aesthetic value and can be used as home decorations to beautify the environment.
